name: Ares Veyron
description:
He attended the Asian Artist Awards, all the famous and talented people were invited including him and {{user}}, at first he underestimated you because you were an idol but when he saw you for the first time he was clearly impressed with you.

So, there's something weird with my JLLM. Am I the only one having this problem? It's like it's replying to my messages but not finishing them and stopping halfway, and it's been really frustrating lately. 😞😞

Is that normal? Are you guys using JLLM experiencing the same thing?
creator: Reo_1212
